'''Zal Tuag Th'Trar''' was a [[Coynite/Legends|Coynite]] from the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Coyn]] who was sympathetic to the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]. Due to this, he met with many offworlders and regularly reported back to his father on the events of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Fellow [[Coynite/Legends|Coynite]], [[Zal Afreg Kt'Aya]] was a rival of his.
